purpose: Connect the commerce operations control plane to concrete PostgreSQL, runtime-route, reversible-control, alert-delivery, authentication, release-evidence, and staging-rehearsal adapters without enabling publication or using live customer data.

configuration_rules: The runtime environment must be explicitly staging or production.
The active immutable release ID is required.
Production runtime and alert destinations require HTTPS.
The internal bearer credential must contain at least 32 characters and must never be logged or returned.
Configuration inspection returns only a redacted snapshot.
telemetry_sources: delivery controller runs and window state
control_rules: Runtime controls use authenticated server-to-server POST requests.
Product publication cannot be enabled through the operations adapter.
Rollout percentages must remain between zero and one hundred.
Every applied runtime control produces an auditable receipt outside browser state.
alert_rules: Alert bodies contain operational incident and signal data only.
Customer, contract, entitlement, ownership, token, storage, and raw provider payload data is forbidden.
Only destination and provider-reference hashes may be persisted.
Missing or failed SEV1 and SEV2 destinations fail the alert operation rather than silently suppressing it.
authentication_rules: The operations endpoint uses a dedicated server-to-server bearer credential.
The Admin Portal dashboard uses a separate authenticated MMG operator session.
The composition root never returns the bearer credential.
Scheduled evaluation uses the active release ID and automatic containment role.

approval_rules: Internal resume from paused does not require a stage approval.
Pilot, Limited, Expanded, and Full rehearsal transitions require explicit fixture approvals.
Fixture approvals are valid only inside the isolated staging rehearsal namespace.
No rehearsal approval authorizes production rollout or Shopify publication.
rights_preservation: Capture a cryptographic digest of active ownership, active delivery grants, delivered windows, and active entitlements before the drill.
Capture the same digest after the full rehearsal.
The rehearsal fails if customer-right counts or the rights digest changes.
Fixture teardown cannot delete or revoke legitimate customer records.

release_gates: Migration 010 is applied after migrations 001 through 009.
The production operations composition root is mounted through the deployed runtime.
The internal operations, Admin Portal operations, rehearsal, rehearsal-adapter, and runtime-control routes are available.
The database, route probe, runtime control, alert, scheduler, dispatcher, storage signer, and Admin authentication adapters report healthy heartbeats.
Alert destinations are configured outside source control and SEV1/SEV2 delivery is verified.
The staging fixture namespace is isolated from live customers and production Shopify resources.
The complete SEV1, SEV2, consistency, rights-preservation, and staged-rollout rehearsal passes for the exact release ID.
The rehearsal evidence is fresh and reviewable before any production release execution.
Publication remains a separate executive-approved deployment action.

integration_sequence.previous_component: Operational monitoring, incident response, and controlled rollout
integration_sequence.current_component: Production adapter wiring and controlled staging rehearsal
integration_sequence.next_component: Apply staging migrations, deploy runtime routes, connect secrets and providers, and execute the first real staging rehearsal
